description:
Multiple requirement descriptions contain stale information that doesn't reflect the current codebase state:

1. REQ-025: Says "paused flag has a bug" but apply_task_status already clears it; says "no validation" but validate_task_status_transition exists
2. REQ-026: Says "55% high priority" and "13/24 missing category/type" — both resolved
3. REQ-031: Gap analysis lists skip_if, on_verdict, HumanEscalated, per-phase retry as missing — all implemented
4. REQ-032: Says "agents start cold" but Phase 1 cross-phase memory is fully implemented
5. REQ-023: Says "TASK-041 (in-progress)" but TASK-041 completed

Update each description to accurately reflect what has been done vs what remains.
title: Update stale requirement descriptions to reflect current codebase
